name: Zoho Campaigns API
what_it_does: Zoho Campaigns REST API for email marketing and campaign automation platform. Enables AI agents to manage mailing lists and contacts, create and schedule campaigns, retrieve campaign analytics, manage email workflows, and integrate Zoho Campaigns into CRM and marketing automation pipelines. Part of the Zoho ecosystem with tight Zoho CRM integration.
use_cases: Managing contact lists and segments from CRM-triggered marketing agents
Creating and scheduling email campaigns from marketing automation agents
Retrieving campaign open, click, and conversion analytics from reporting agents
Integrating Zoho Campaigns engagement data into Zoho CRM workflow agents
not_for: High-volume transactional email (use Zoho Transmail for that)
Consumer email newsletter without business marketing context
best_when: An organization using Zoho Campaigns for email marketing wants AI agents to automate list management, schedule campaigns, and integrate email engagement data into CRM workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Email contact data and engagement metrics are personal data. GDPR and CAN-SPAM compliance required. Double opt-in enforcement important.

auth.notes: Zoho Campaigns uses Zoho OAuth 2.0. Scopes include ZohoCampaigns.contact.READ, ZohoCampaigns.campaign.CREATE, etc. Access tokens expire in 1 hour.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan: up to 6,000 emails/month, 2,000 contacts
pricing.paid_tiers: Standard, Professional plans scaling contacts and email volume
pricing.notes: Competitive email marketing pricing. Part of Zoho suite. API access included.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in API reference

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Email contact data requires GDPR consent and CAN-SPAM compliance
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API integration required
Domain verification required for sending campaigns — set up DNS records before API use
OAuth tokens expire in 1 hour — implement refresh token rotation
Zoho ecosystem integration is tight — pair with Zoho CRM API for full marketing stack
agent_readiness.security_notes: Email contact PII and marketing engagement data. SOC2, GDPR, CAN-SPAM. OAuth2 with scopes. Multi-region data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: Email contact PII. SOC2, GDPR, CAN-SPAM. OAuth2 with contact/campaign scopes. Multi-region.
